wins_analysis: No wins today as the system generated zero recommendations. The AI module was unavailable and the zone score fallback failed to produce any actionable setups despite a favorable trending_up regime.
losses_analysis: No losses today, but the real failure is opportunity cost — a +1.0% Nifty rally with ADX=25 and VIX=15 is an ideal environment for momentum/demand zone trades, yet the system sat idle generating zero P&L.
regime_impact: Today's trending_up regime with strong ADX=25 and low VIX=15 was highly favorable for directional long trades. The system completely failed to capitalize on this — demand zone BUY setups aligned with trend would have been ideal.

improvements.action: Fix AI module availability — implement a robust fallback that uses zone score with relaxed thresholds (e.g., min_zone_score >= 65 instead of default 75) when AI is offline, especially on trending_up days
improvements.reason: AI was unavailable and fallback produced zero setups on a day where Nifty rallied 1.0% — system must not go fully silent on strong trend days

improvements.action: Add a momentum-based backup scanner that triggers when regime=trending_up AND ADX>=22 AND VIX<18: scan for stocks breaking above previous day high within first 30 min with volume > 1.5x average
improvements.reason: Zero setups on a textbook trend day means the scanning logic has a single point of failure; a secondary momentum scanner would have caught leaders like RELIANCE, INFY, or HDFCBANK on a broad rally

improvements.action: Pre-compute demand zones for top 15 Nifty 50 stocks by relative strength the evening before, so that even without live AI, pending orders can be placed at key levels before market open
improvements.reason: If zones were pre-calculated, the fallback system could have placed limit orders at demand zones of trending stocks regardless of AI availability

improvements.action: On trending_up regime days, prioritize symbols with RS (relative strength vs Nifty) > 1.0 and near fresh demand zones — specifically screen RELIANCE, BAJFINANCE, HDFCBANK, TCS, INFY for tomorrow
improvements.reason: Broad Nifty +1.0% rally means sector leaders likely made clean moves off support; selecting high-RS stocks increases probability on continuation trades

improvements.action: Set an alert/override: if by 9:45 AM the system has zero pending orders on a trending day (ADX>22, Nifty gap-up > 0.3%), force-run the zone fallback scanner with min_score reduced to 60
improvements.reason: Today the system produced nothing all day — a time-based failsafe ensures at least some participation on high-probability regime days

tomorrow_focus: With Nifty in a confirmed uptrend (ADX=25, VIX=15), prioritize BUY setups at demand zones on high-RS stocks — ensure the scanning system is operational and fallback thresholds are relaxed to avoid another zero-trade day.

symbol_notes.RELIANCE.NS: Likely rallied with Nifty today — check if price is at or near a fresh demand zone for continuation BUY tomorrow
symbol_notes.HDFCBANK.NS: Banking heavyweight in uptrend — look for demand zone pullback entry if Nifty stays positive
symbol_notes.INFY.NS: IT sector relative strength may provide clean trend-following setup on pullback to 15min demand zone
symbol_notes.BAJFINANCE.NS: High-beta name tends to outperform on trend days — scan for breakout above today's high with volume confirmation
